concept_options.title: Every Jorr Counts (brand promo)
concept_options.hook: In the akhada, every jorr counts. But who's counting?
concept_options.visual_approach: flat motion graphics in DesiJorrKhana's mitti/brass/sindoor palette; typed Remotion scenes with word-level captions
concept_options.why_this_works: explains the product in one sitting, matches the app's visual identity, zero-key producible

concept_options.title: What is a Jorr? (culture explainer)
concept_options.hook: Before gyms had mirrors, akhadas had mud.
concept_options.visual_approach: documentary-style with archive stills (needs stock footage sourcing)
concept_options.why_this_works: shareable culture content that builds the brand beyond the tool

concept_options.title: Set Card Flex (social loop)
concept_options.hook: POV: your scorecard after morning jorr.
concept_options.why_this_works: made for shares; but Explainer composition is 16:9 today, vertical needs new composition work

selected_concept.rationale: directly serves the product, fully producible with the zero-key toolchain available right now. animation_mode: remotion_templated; audio_architecture: single_narrator; reuse_strategy: brand palette tokens + section_title overlay family reused across scenes.

stages.approach: per-scene Piper WAVs; timings measured with ffprobe drive the scene plan
scene in/out from narration durations + word-level caption track

approval.user_notes: pre-authorized autonomous run; see decision_log d-001
